message: This conversion assumes an underlying continuous trait exists and has a logistic distribution for each group. Please use conversions carefully and conduct sensitivity analyses with and without converted data.
formula: d <- yi * (sqrt(3)/pi); J <- ifelse((n1+n2-2) <= 1, NA_real_, exp(lgamma((n1+n2-2)/2) - log(sqrt((n1+n2-2)/2)) - lgamma(((n1+n2-2) - 1)/2))); yi_trans <- J * d

formula: J <- ifelse((n1 + n2 - 2) <= 1, NA_real_, exp(lgamma((n1 + n2 - 2)/2) - log(sqrt((n1 + n2 - 2)/2)) - lgamma(((n1 + n2 - 2) - 1)/2))); d <- yi / J; a <- (n1 + n2)^2 / (n1 * n2); r <- d/sqrt(d^2 + a); yi_trans <- atanh(r)
exec_formula: J <- ifelse((input$n1 + input$n2 - 2) <= 1, NA_real_, exp(lgamma((input$n1 + input$n2 - 2)/2) - log(sqrt((input$n1 + input$n2 - 2)/2)) - lgamma(((input$n1 + input$n2 - 2) - 1)/2))); d <- input$yi / J; a <- (input$n1 + input$n2)^2 / (input$n1 * input$n2); r <- d/sqrt(d^2 + a); yi_trans <- atanh(r)
